# OJEX Oil and Gas Services

> Industrial procurement, equipment supply, base oil & diesel distribution, logistics, and oilfield manpower recruitment across West Africa.

OJEX Oil and Gas Services is a Nigerian-incorporated procurement and manpower partner for upstream operators, EPC contractors, and industrial clients across Nigeria, West Africa, and beyond. Based in Port Harcourt, Rivers State.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of OJEX services and industries served.
- [About](/about): Company background, mission, and capabilities.
- [Services](/services): Full list of energy-sector service lines.
- [Products](/products): Catalog of industrial equipment, tools, PPE, and consumables.
- [Industries](/industries): Sectors OJEX serves.
- [Projects](/projects): Past project highlights.
- [Careers](/careers): Open positions and general applications.
- [Blog](/blog): News, industry insights, and updates.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Common questions on sourcing, lead times, and vendor onboarding.
- [Contact](/contact): Office, phone, email, and WhatsApp.
- [Request a Quote](/quote): Submit an RFQ for equipment, fuel, or manpower.
- [Vendor Registration](/vendor-registration): Register as an OJEX supplier.

## Services

- [Procurement & Sourcing](/services/procurement): Global sourcing of certified industrial equipment and consumables.
- [Industrial Equipment Supply](/services/equipment): Shale shakers, mud cleaners, drilling tools, offshore equipment.
- [Base Oil & Diesel Supply](/services/diesel): Bulk AGO/diesel and base oil distribution.
- [Manpower & Recruitment](/services/recruitment): Technical, engineering, and offshore staffing.
- [Logistics Support](/services/logistics): Customs clearance, freight forwarding, on-site delivery.
- [Safety Equipment](/services/safety): Certified PPE, FRC coveralls, safety supplies.
- [Offshore Support](/services/offshore): Marine equipment and offshore platform supplies.
- [Vendor Management](/services/vendor-management): Pre-qualified vendor pool with contract administration.

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
